tasks.label: 1. Bundle to submit.cpp
tasks.command: @echo off & echo [START] 1. Bundle to submit.cpp & python3\python.exe my-library\expander.py main.cpp --lib my-library -o submit.cpp && echo [DONE] 1. Bundle to submit.cpp
tasks.detail: Bundles main.cpp: first inlines my-library/ headers via my-library/expander.py, then inlines ACL headers via expander.py, outputting to submit.cpp.

tasks.label: Build submit.cpp
tasks.command: @echo off & echo [START] Build submit.cpp & "${workspaceFolder}\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -fdiagnostics-color=always -std=c++23 -O2 -static -I "${workspaceFolder}\ac-library" -I "${workspaceFolder}\my-library" "${workspaceFolder}\submit.cpp" -o "${workspaceFolder}\submit.exe" && echo [DONE] Build submit.cpp

tasks.label: 2. Run submit.cpp
tasks.command: @echo off & echo [START] 2. Run submit.cpp & "${workspaceFolder}\submit.exe" & echo [DONE] 2. Run submit.cpp
tasks.detail: Builds and then runs submit.exe in the integrated terminal (supports interactive stdin).

tasks.label: 3. Run submit.cpp (+ in.txt)
tasks.command: @echo off & echo [START] 3. Run submit.cpp (+ in.txt) & "${workspaceFolder}\submit.exe" < "${workspaceFolder}\in.txt" && echo [DONE] 3. Run submit.cpp (+ in.txt)
tasks.detail: Builds and then runs submit.exe with stdin redirected from in.txt.

tasks.label: 4. Run All Tests
tasks.command: @echo off & echo [START] 4. Run All Tests & setlocal enabledelayedexpansion & set FAIL=0 & for %f in ("${workspaceFolder}\my-library\test\test_*.cpp") do ( echo. & echo ---- %~nf ---- & "${workspaceFolder}\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -std=c++23 -O2 -static -I "${workspaceFolder}\ac-library" -I "${workspaceFolder}\my-library" "%f" -o "${workspaceFolder}\my-library\test\%~nf.exe" && "${workspaceFolder}\my-library\test\%~nf.exe" || set FAIL=1 ) & if !FAIL!==1 ( echo. & echo [FAILED] Some tests encountered an error! & exit /b 1 ) else ( echo. & echo [OK] All tests ran successfully! & echo [DONE] 4. Run All Tests )
tasks.detail: Compiles and executes all test/test_*.cpp files, printing per-file and overall success/failure to the internal terminal.
